query:
insert into photos
              (owner_id, storage_key, original_name, bytes, mime,
               original_uploaded_at, short_id, last_step,
               setup_id, scope, camera)
            values ($1, 'k', 'orig.jpg', 1000, 'image/jpeg',
                   now(), gen_random_uuid()::text, 'caption',
                   $2, $3, $4)
            returning id
